svg.text: One QLoRA dose ladder on OLMo-3-7B-Instruct (recipe v7): training rows cycle rationale → letter → judge-verdict at 1:1:1,
the judge rows format-matched to the downstream judge readout and preferring the cautious answer (cautious rate 0.97)
The coordinate no behavior-format ladder touched
probability — all three readouts on one 0–1 scale
